allow: PowerShell(curl.exe -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary "@-" http://127.0.0.1:8123/api/chat <# stdin not supported here #>; $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.Headers.Add\("Content-Type","application/json"\); try { $wc.UploadString\("http://127.0.0.1:8123/api/chat", '{"scenario_id":null,"messages":[{"role":"user","text":"Hello"}]}'\) } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.InnerException.Response; if \($resp\) { \(New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\)\).ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } })
